companies.name: Coca-Cola
companies.reason: Trending after posting strong Q3 earnings driven by demand for Coke Zero and Fairlife, reaffirming its leadership in the beverage industry.

companies.name: Bath & Body Works
companies.reason: Stock surged on an upgraded full-year outlook and popular seasonal collections, highlighting strength in personal care and home fragrance retail.

companies.name: Kellanova
companies.reason: The pending acquisition by Mars Inc. is nearing completion, creating a global snacking powerhouse and significantly reshaping the consumer packaged goods sector.
